generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance Motor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "A permanent magnet synchronous motor generating torque (τ_M) from input current (I_M)"
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "A multi-stage gearbox system (gearwheel + cycloidal gearbox) reducing torque (τ_G → τ_out) while transmitting rotational motion with low backlash and positional uncertainty reduction via encoder feedback"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "The cycloidal gearbox component within the gear transmission system ensuring low backlash and positional uncertainty reduction"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Positional encoder measuring motor angular position to reduce backlash/elasticity-related uncertainties"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox measuring angular position for positional uncertainty reduction"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor input current (I_M) converted to torque using motor-specific constants"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance StructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram defining components (motor, gearbox) and their interconnections (rotational/torque flows)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Coulomb-Viscous friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Stribeck friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating Dahl friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model simulating LuGre friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of motor torque measured via current sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredMotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of motor angular position from encoders"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Outputs from simulation models showing motor torque with friction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedMotorVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Outputs from simulation models showing motor velocity with friction"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of gearbox angular position from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
]

instance FrictionModelOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined data output from friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool used for creating structural and behavioral models of the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink environment for creating and simulating friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables MeasuredMotorTorqueData, MeasuredMotorAngleData, MeasuredGearboxPositionData
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard integrating data traces and friction model outputs"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification and differentiation of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StaticFrictionInsight, KineticFrictionInsight, ViscousFrictionInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated vs. measured data to detect friction-induced deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataValidationInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of operational data (torque, velocity, current) and friction model outputs for decision-making"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDashboard
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StaticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static friction components affecting motion accuracy"
]

instance KineticFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of kinetic friction components affecting motion accuracy"
]

instance ViscousFrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of viscous friction components affecting motion accuracy"
]

instance DataValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison results showing deviations between simulated and measured data due to friction"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven friction models inform motion accuracy improvements via model-based control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ProactiveAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dashboard provides visual feedback enabling proactive adjustments to friction-induced inaccuracies"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModelRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Continuous refinement of friction models during operation via real-time data integration"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Environment and Components
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Motor, GearTransmission, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "The first vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot comprising motor, gear transmission, and cycloidal gearbox"
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and near-real-time**:
  - **Data acquisition frequency**: Sensor data (I_M, torque, velocity) is streamed at **high resolution** (implied by live operational data integration).
  - **Model updates**: Friction models are dynamically refined during operation via **continuous identification** of friction parameters (e.g., wear, load, temperature effects).
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are processed and visualized in a **dashboard** with minimal latency to support real-time control adjustments."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is **single-axis focused** for the robot’s first axis, orchestrated as:
  - **Centralized**: A **single digital shadow** (FrictionShadow) encapsulates all data traces, models, and processing components (e.g., Simulation M, Simulation GW, Simulation GB).
  - **Components**:
    - **Asset**: MABI MAX 100 first axis (motor + gearbox).
    - **Data Traces**: Measured (I_M, torque, velocity) and simulated (friction models) outputs.
    - **Processing**: Simulation models (MATLAB Simulink) and a **dashboard** for visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As Designed**: Structural and behavioral models (SysML) describe the idealized robot axis.
  - **As Manufactured**: Live sensor data and simulation models (MATLAB Simulink) validate the physical behavior during operation.
  - **As Operated**: Continuous friction model updates and real-time adjustments during machining tasks."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured via:
  - **Model Validation**: Comparison of simulated vs. measured data traces (e.g., motor torque/velocity) to detect friction-induced deviations.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Encoder feedback reduces positional uncertainty by mitigating backlash/elasticity effects.
  - **Verification/Validation**: Continuous identification of friction parameters (load, temperature, wear) via live data integration.
  - **Traceability**: Metadata links data traces to their computational origins (e.g., sensor, simulation model) for transparency."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections are established via:
  - **Data Transmission**: **MQTT protocol** for real-time sensor data streaming from the robot’s CNC controller (SINUMERIK 840D).
  - **Model Integration**: SysML models and MATLAB Simulink simulations are linked to physical data traces for cohesive processing.
  - **Dashboard**: Unified visualization platform for data traces and friction model outputs."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)**: UML class diagram (Fig. 1) for structuring data traces, models, and metadata.
  - **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)**: SysML for structural/behavioral modeling and MATLAB Simulink for simulations.
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Standardized data transmission for sensor streams."
]
